calendar.matters:
Motion Modify Court Ordered Liquidation Rate
Off Calendar Jun-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: 06-08-05
(416) Clerk: Millie Java; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR# 12355.
General Admonition that Comm. Rebecca Wightman hears matter as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother not present; Father present, In Pro Per, CSA = Saporito. Extensive off record discussion held with father, agency and the court. Court grants Department of Child Support Services Motion to Modify Court Ordered Liquidation Rate. Court orders liquidation amount modified to $700.00 per month effective July 1, 2005. This order supercedes 1993 order re: liquidation. Court stays Wage Assignment Order and Garnishment enforcement activity so long as Father pays on a timely basis as to the $700.00 per month without prejudice to Child Support Agency as to arrears (i.e., lump sum). So long as Father is current, Department of Child Support Services shall not suspend any licenses. Father standing order to notify Department of Child Support of any receipt of lump sum re Mother's estate within 30 days. (Wightman)

Motion Modify Court Ordered Liquidation Rate
Off Calendar Mar-24-2005 Continued To Jun-08-05 At 03:00 P.M. In Dept 416
MINI MINUTES: 03-24-05
(416) Clerk: JAVA/NORIEGA; Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR# 12355.
General Admonition that Comm. Rebecca Wightman hears matter as Judge Pro Tempore. Mother present by telephone; Father present with Counsel Theodore Winchester,; CSA = McCally.
Father to provide his tax returns from 1993 forward within 60 days. Existing court order remains in place. Matter is continued for long cause hearing to June 8, 2005 @ 3:00 PM in Room 416 by request of CSA = McCally. (Wightman)
Ntc Of Motion To Establish Payment Schedule For Support Arrears, Calendar Motion: Other
